hero.subtitle: Experience the finest Ethiopian agricultural and processed food products. From our farms directly to your table, maintaining international quality standards.

about_preview.title: About Matinsun
about_preview.desc: Registered under Baltina PLC, Matinsun is dedicated to scaling Ethiopian agriculture through uncompromising quality, innovation, and global export reach. We are committed to empowering local farming communities while delivering the finest processed food products to the world.

products_highlight.title: Our Premium Products
products_highlight.subtitle: Discover our range of processed Baltina products, crafted for authentic taste and exceptional quality.

business_expansion.title: Global Business Expansion
business_expansion.subtitle: Bridging local agricultural excellence with global markets through comprehensive business solutions.
business_expansion.export_desc: Supplying premium Ethiopian agricultural products to international markets with strict adherence to global quality and safety standards.
business_expansion.import_desc: Sourcing high-quality agricultural inputs and processing machinery to enhance local production capabilities.
business_expansion.logistics_desc: Ensuring smooth and efficient supply chain management from farm gates to consumer packaging facilities.

production_process.title: Our Production Process
production_process.subtitle: From seed to shelf, our process ensures uncompromising quality at every step.
production_process.step1_desc: Partnering with local farmers for the best raw materials.
production_process.step2_desc: Rigorous lab testing for standards compliance.
production_process.step4_desc: Secure packaging for extended shelf life.

cta.title: Ready to Partner With Us?
cta.subtitle: Join us in bringing premium Ethiopian agricultural products to the world.

footer.intro: Empowering Agriculture, Delivering Quality Food Products. Registered under Baltina PLC.
footer.address: Sheger City – Gelan Sub City, Ethiopia

about.subtitle: Registered under Baltina PLC. Scaling Ethiopian agriculture through uncompromising quality, innovation, and global export reach.

overview.title: Matinsun Agricultural Product Sales & Manufacturing
overview.p1_rest: , Matinsun stands at the forefront of agricultural excellence. We are driven by a visionary approach to scale Ethiopian agriculture through uncompromising quality, technological innovation, and an ever-expanding global export reach.
overview.hub_desc_2: , our state-of-the-art facilities empower us to source the finest raw materials, process them with rigorous safety standards, and deliver premium food products to global markets.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To produce and distribute the finest quality agricultural and processed food products, elevating the standard of Ethiopian Baltina goods globally while directly empowering local farming communities.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: To be the leading, most trusted agribusiness brand in East Africa, setting the absolute benchmark for food safety, technological innovation in production, and sustainable agricultural logistics.

quality.title: Absolute Quality
quality.desc: No compromises. International certification standards at every level.

growth.title: Sustainable Growth
growth.desc: Environmentally conscious farming and ethical sourcing.

community.title: Community First
community.desc: Empowering local farmers and maintaining fair trade principles.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: Applying modern technology to traditional food processing methods.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.desc: Clear, trackable production from farm to consumer packaging.

trust.title: Customer Trust
trust.desc: Building long-term relationships through consistent excellence.

products.subtitle: Authentic Ethiopian agricultural goods, processed and packaged to international standards for purity and quality.

berbere.name: Matisun Berbere
berbere.desc: Premium Ethiopian spicy blend made from sun-dried red chilies and authentic spices. Perfect for rich wots.

shiro.name: Matisun Meten Shiro
shiro.desc: Expertly spiced chickpea flour blend used to make Ethiopia's most beloved stew.

bula.name: Matisun Bula
bula.desc: Highly nutritious powder extracted from the Enset plant, perfect for rich, smooth porridge.

beso.name: Matisun Beso
beso.desc: Roasted barley flour, an excellent source of energy, traditionally consumed as a drink or healthy snack.

mitmita.name: Matisun Mitmita
mitmita.desc: Extra hot spice blend made from bird's eye chili, cardamom, cloves, and salt. Best for raw meat or flavoring.

atmit.name: Matisun Oat Atimit
atmit.desc: A soothing and highly nutritious oat-based porridge blend, rich in fiber and vital vitamins.

abish.name: Matisun Abish Flour
abish.desc: Pure fenugreek flour renowned for its incredible health benefits, distinct flavor, and medicinal properties.

business.subtitle: Baltina PLC operates across multiple critical vectors of the agricultural supply chain.

export.title: Agricultural Export
export.desc: We export high-quality Ethiopian agricultural and processed goods to international markets, ensuring strict compliance with global standards.

import.title: Agricultural Input Import
import.desc: To empower local farming, we import top-tier agricultural inputs and technologies that increase crop yield and sustainability.

logistics.title: Agricultural Logistics & Distribution
logistics.desc: We provide end-to-end logistics services, successfully bridging the gap between rural farms and urban or international markets.
logistics.content: Our modernized fleet ensures that raw materials reach our manufacturing hubs efficiently, and our packaged products are delivered securely without losing their freshness. We heavily prioritize safety, speed, and trackability.

production.subtitle: A seamless blend of traditional Ethiopian recipes and modern, high-capacity manufacturing technology.

selection.title: Selection
selection.desc: Careful hand-selection of the finest raw materials directly from trusted local Ethiopian farms.

cleaning.title: Cleaning
cleaning.desc: Extensive multi-stage cleaning processes to ensure zero impurities before milling.

roasting.title: Roasting
roasting.desc: Precision temperature-controlled roasting to lock in authentic traditional flavors and aromas.

grinding.title: Grinding
grinding.desc: State-of-the-art closed milling systems ensuring perfect consistency and texture for every spice and flour blend.

quality.title: Quality Control
quality.desc: Strict laboratory testing to systematically verify purity, spice levels, and absolute food safety.

packaging.title: Packaging
packaging.desc: Hygienic, moisture-proof vacuum packaging line designed to ensure maximum shelf life.

distribution.title: Distribution
distribution.desc: Efficient logistics network dispatching optimally fresh products both locally and globally.

team.subtitle: The brilliant minds driving Matinsun (Baltina PLC) to regional and international success.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: We want to hear from you. Reach out for bulk orders, export inquiries, or general support.
